title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Office of the Senior Citizens Affairs OSCA) Resolution No. 2020-06-02 Dated June 04, 2020 Entitled Resolution Approving the 2021 Annual Investment Program (AIP) of the Office of the Senior Citizen Affairs, Los Baños, Laguna in the Amount of Two Million Four Hundred Forty Thousand Five Hundred Forty-eight Pesos Only (PHP 2,440,548.00). (AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 06/29/2020)
